calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler for Feixue Lei.

The Court stated that it has a problem with title, that the property was listed in joint tenancy and asked Counsel how you overcome the existence of the deeds. Counsel presented oral argument to support his position. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy McConico.
